projects.name: On Deck!
projects.description: A convenient aggregated sports calendar for all your favorite teams.

projects.name: Autonomous Aerial Drone
projects.description: An autonomous drone capable of stable flight and landmark detection through a PID controller, SLAM algorithm, and edge computer vision.

projects.name: Tigro App
projects.description: Android app for the tigro research project, which aims to provide grassroots protestors with a secure and anonymous way to communicate and organize. Working with encrypted databases and shared secret key generation.

projects.name: Parakeet.ai
projects.description: A frictionless experience to allow the elderly to share rich stories with their loved ones while generating data for AI avatars. Our submission for the 36-hour HackHarvard 2023 hackathon.

projects.name: Github Folders
projects.description: A chrome extension that allows you to organize important Github repositories into folders.

projects.name: Masterlock Combo-breaker
projects.description: A device that can crack a Masterlock combination lock in 16 combinations or less. Exploits a vulnerability in the Masterlock design to reduce the search space by 99%. Built with Arduino.
